codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: PAPERCLIP_* env references were renamed to PAPIERKLAMMER_* across runtime code, adapter env injection surfaces, configs, scripts, and docs; a dedicated verification test suite was also added.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rename-worker procedure says to write tests first (red) before renaming, but this run performed bulk sed renames first and created the verification test afterward.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 20b93a9b-17ea-42dd-a2fd-109ee64d0278): Execute sed-based bulk rename appears before Tool: Create server/src/__tests__/fork-env-var-rename-verification.test.ts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill guidance does not explicitly call out extensionless files (Dockerfiles), which caused an extra manual pass after initial grep-based replacement.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly notes Dockerfiles needed separate handling because extension-based matching missed them; transcript shows a follow-up sed command targeting Dockerfile, Dockerfile.onboard-smoke, and docker/untrusted-review/Dockerfile.

summary: PASS — No blocking correctness issues found in commit 4e903f8e. The env-var rename is comprehensive and aligned with expected behavior; only skill/process documentation gaps were observed.
